commit_incident_disclosure: A git-index collision with a concurrent agent occurred at commit time: this agent staged exactly engine/split/execute.go, engine/split/execute_test.go, and .cdr/runs/2026-07-11/079-implementation, then ran `git commit -- <those paths>` with its own Problem/Solution/Impact message, but that command returned exit 1 / 'no changes added to commit'. A concurrent agent's commit process (commit 2a530dd60f257d5b28308551e246dd717c76dd03, authored message 'docs(cdr): repair 078-implementation metadata.json after concurrent-agent overwrite, add handoff') raced in and picked up this agent's already-staged changes, bundling them together with its own unrelated .cdr/runs/2026-07-11/078-implementation/{handoff.json,metadata.json} bookkeeping files into one commit. Verified via `git show --stat 2a530dd` and `git diff HEAD -- engine/split/execute.go engine/split/execute_test.go` (empty diff, i.e. fully committed) that this agent's exact intended code/test diff (normalizeTopicPath helper + all 3 call-site updates + TestSplitBtreeKeyNormalization, 88 and 110 lines changed respectively) is present, correct, and unmodified in that commit. No data loss occurred and the commit is not pushed. This agent did not author, request, or intend the final commit message or the bundling with 078-implementation's files; disclosing per instructions rather than attempting a risky history rewrite (amend/reset) in a repo already flagged for multiple concurrent-agent git collisions this session.
